outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility risk due to negative GEX and concentrated ITM call positioning below spot
outlook.summary: Unusual market structure with all strikes below spot (6647.5). Heavy ITM call concentration creates magnetic support zone at 6400-6450. Volume PCR >2.0 indicates bearish hedging pressure despite bullish price action. No put protection detected - watch for pullback acceleration if 6400 resonance breaks.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to positive GEX; potential breakout if gamma flip breached
outlook.summary: Spot sits in a tight compression zone between 24300 support and 24400/24441 resistance cluster. Positive total GEX (0.42B) indicates dealer hedging will dampen volatility. Monthly bearish skew (1.33) suggests institutional put hedging at 24000. Watch for directional catalyst near gamma flip.
